title: EU to crack down on TikTok, Instagram's ‘addictive design’ targeting kids on social media
summary_full: "We are investigating platforms that allow children to go down "rabbit holes" of harmful content," EU Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said Tuesday.
summary_public: "We are investigating platforms that allow children to go down "rabbit holes" of harmful content," EU Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said Tuesday.
